title: BEM-900 roadmap coverage
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/roadmap').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

coverage = {
  'bem':'BEM-900',
  'source_protocol':'BEM-879 v1.7 accepted roadmap',
  'status':'COVERAGE_BUILT',
  'autonomous_execution_boundary':{
    'can_execute_without_operator':['routine_development','registry_updates','rules','channels','workspaces','product_repository_templates','selftests','dashboards','report_packaging','readiness_state','pilot_scaffold'],
    'must_gate_operator':['strategic_business_pilot_choice','real_client_selection','scope_expansion','paid_api','secrets','issue_31_write','schedule_trigger_change','unresolved_blocker']
  },
  'completed_layers':[
    {'range':'BEM-880','result':'accepted roadmap v1.7 executed through Worker 3 contours'},
    {'range':'BEM-883..BEM-889','result':'baseline converted from scaffold to executable READY repository baseline'},
    {'range':'BEM-890..BEM-899','result':'sending contour, autonomous loop, policy gate, cycle packaging, health dashboard READY'}
  ],
  'next_autonomous_layers':[
    {'id':'BEM-901','title':'pilot readiness scaffold','operator_gate':False},
    {'id':'BEM-902','title':'business model canvas machine-readable template and evaluator','operator_gate':False},
    {'id':'BEM-903','title':'product repository onboarding kit','operator_gate':False},
    {'id':'BEM-904','title':'evaluation dashboard and SLA templates','operator_gate':False},
    {'id':'BEM-905','title':'real pilot selection gate','operator_gate':True}
  ]
}
Path('governance/roadmap/BEM900_V17_COVERAGE_MATRIX.json').write_text(json.dumps(coverage, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
md = '# BEM-900 v1.7 roadmap coverage matrix\n\nStatus: COVERAGE_BUILT\n\nAutonomous work continues until a true operator gate is reached.\n\nCompleted layers:\n'
for item in coverage['completed_layers']:
    md += '- ' + item['range'] + ': ' + item['result'] + '\n'
md += '\nNext autonomous layers:\n'
for item in coverage['next_autonomous_layers']:
    md += '- ' + item['id'] + ': ' + item['title'] + ' | operator gate: ' + str(item['operator_gate']) + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM900_V17_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM900_ROADMAP_COVERAGE_READY.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-900 roadmap coverage proof\nStatus: READY\nNext autonomous layers: BEM-901..BEM-904\nGate: BEM-905 real pilot selection\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/roadmap/BEM900_V17_COVERAGE_MATRIX.json','governance/reports/BEM900_V17_COVERAGE_MATRIX.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM900 roadmap coverage built')
